== Notes for [[Item:Q103536|Q103536]] ==

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=51279

http://bibliotecadigital.rah.es/dgbrah/i18n/consulta/registro.cmd?id=45592

Spanish ecclesiastical who held the offices of Bishop of Orihuela (1566-1577), Bishop of Segovia (1577-1579) and confessor of Queen Elizabeth of Valois.

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gregorio_Antonio_Gallo_de_Andrade

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000078039902863

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
